delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: In this course, students will improve their English conversations skills through topic-based conversation. Each week, they will be assigned a topic. They will then have pair/group discussions on the topic and prepare a short presentation. Through this format, they will acquire critical thinking skills and the ability to express their opinions and ideas on a wide variety of current topics.
aims: In this course, students will improve their English conversations skills through topic-based conversation. Each week, they will be assigned a topic. They will then have pair/group discussions on the topic and prepare a short presentation. Through this format, they will acquire critical thinking skills and the ability to express their opinions and ideas on a wide variety of current topics.
goals: Reading comprehension of current events articles (beginner/intermediate level)

prep: Students will be required to review conversation, language functions and techniques in class to prepare for future lessons and class assessments.
